originalTitle: Fixing Reinforcement Learning with PufferLib - Live Dev
title: Debugging LSTM Bug in PufferLib and Code Reviewing Blaster C Environment
summary: Worked on a bug introduced by recent performance optimizations in PufferLib that caused training to fail; identified an issue with LSTM initial hidden state handling and fixed it. Then reviewed and merged a PR for the Blaster C environment, providing code review feedback and guidance.
